somali.or_skip_no_pressure: Ama ka bood — cadaadis ma jiro.
somali.is_where_most_people_start_fingers_res: waa halka dadka badankood ay ka bilaabaan — faraha waxay ku nastaan a, s, d, f  ·  j, k, l, ;
somali.button_dyslexia_font_audio_cues_high_c: . Font-ka dyslexia, calaamadaha codka, high-contrast, kiiboodh furayaal waaweyn leh, iyo wax kale — iyagu waa alaabta laftirkeeda, ma aha bedel.
somali.no_timers_no_races_no_streak_punishmen: Timer ma jiro, tartan ma jiro, ciqaab streak ah ma jirto. Ku soco xawaarahaaga. Jooji markasta oo aad rabto.
somali.drill_ai_writes_practice_text_at_your_: — AI wuxuu qoraa qoraal tababar oo heerka fasalkaaga ah oo ku saabsan wax kasta oo aad danaynayso. Shid
somali.and_it_will_illustrate_what_you_type: wuxuuna sawiri doonaa waxa aad qorto.
somali.can_change_the_row_of_colored_swatches: way beddelmi kartaa — safka midabada ee kore wuxuu u beddelaa 5 theme. Ama tabo
somali.a_clinician_or_teacher_can_set_an_iep_: Takhaatiir ama macallin wuxuu dhigi karaa yool IEP oo horumarka ka soo saari karaa
somali.unique_calendar_days_with_at_least_one: Maalmo kalandar kala duwan oo ugu yaraan hal session leh 30-kii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay. Dembi ma jiro maalmaha nasashada.
somali.type_or_paste_the_text_plain_letters_n: Qor ama dhaji qoraalka. Xarfaha caadiga ah, tirooyinka, iyo calaamadaha caadiga ah ayaa ugu wanaagsan.
somali.this_session_won_t_be_saved_no_pressur: — session-kan lama kaydin doono. Cadaadis ma jiro, diiwaan ma jiro.
somali.or_press_space_or_enter_to_begin_press: Ama tabo Space ama Enter si aad u bilowdo. Tabo Esc wakhti kasta inta drill-ka socdo si aad uga baxdo.
somali.non_english_passages_use_ascii_only_no: Qoraallada aan Ingiriisiga ahayn waxay isticmaalaan ASCII kaliya (accent / tilde ma jiro) si furayaasha kiiboodhka caadiga ah ay u sii ahaadaan bartilmaameedka tababarka.
somali.e_g_space_dogs_minecraft_the_ocean_mai: tusaale, hawada sare, eyaha, Minecraft, badda, jiilaalka Maine
somali.hand_written_passage_sets_that_work_wi: Xirmooyin qoraal oo gacanta lagu qoray oo shaqeeya AI la'aanteed. Qoraallada la soo dejiyay waxay ku biiraan library-gaaga; qoraal isku mid ah toddobaad ka toddobaad waa aasaas ka caadil badan isbeddelka IEP marka loo eego qoraal dib loo abuuray.
somali.recently_generated_passages_drill_any_: Qoraallada dhawaan la sameeyay. Drill mid kasta oo ka mid ah si aad dib u isticmaasho. Kii ugu duqoobay ayaa baxaya marka aad samayso kii 9-aad.
somali.warmup_mode_session_will_not_be_saved: Warmup mode — session lama kaydin doono
somali.each_bar_chars_typed_in_a_10_second_wi: Bar kasta = xarfaha la qoray daaqad 10 ilbiriqsi ah. Kor saar si aad u aragto WPM qiyaastii.
somali.your_answer_helps_teachers_see_when_th: Jawaabtaadu waxay ka caawisaa macallimiinta inay arkaan marka tirooyinku aysan sheegin sheekada oo dhan.
somali.how_did_this_session_go_started_slow_p: Sidee bay session-kani u dhacday? "Waan gaabis ku bilaabay, waan sii waday, waxaan isticmaalay slow-motion mode..."
somali.note_saved_with_this_session_it_will_a: Qoraalka waa lagu kaydiyay session-kan. Wuxuu ka muuqan doonaa warbixinta IEP iyo soo saarista CSV.
somali.refine_the_last_image_using_image_to_i: Hagaaji sawirkii ugu dambeeyay adigoo isticmaalaya image-to-image halkii aad ka bilaabi lahayd bilow
somali.download_this_image_as_a_png_file: Soo deji sawirkan oo ah fayl PNG ah
somali.recent_tap_to_restore: Dhawaan · tabo si aad u soo celiso
somali.retry_the_same_text_to_beat_your_score: Dib u isku day qoraalka isku midka ah si aad uga gudubto dhibcahaaga
somali.shows_the_full_passage_for_this_many_s: Wuxuu muujiyaa qoraalka buuxa muddo ilbiriqsiyaadkan ah ka hor inta aan qoristu bilaaban. Wuxuu caawiyaa ardayda ka faa'iidaysta akhriska marka hore, kadibna soo saarista. Ardaygu wuu ka boodi karaa tirinta wakhti kasta.
somali.after_this_many_minutes_of_active_typi: Ka dib daqiiqadahan qoris firfircoon (wakhtiga la joojiyay lama tirinayo), muuji xasuusin degan oo ah in la nasto. Wuxuu dhacaa hal mar drill kasta. Waa la damiyay caadi ahaan.
somali.swap_the_whole_look_of_the_tool_high_c: Beddel muuqaalka guud ee qalabka. High-contrast mode wuxuu ka sarreeyaa theme-yada. Kawaii waa theme iftiin ah; kuwa kalena waa noocyo madow.
somali.swap_the_highlight_color_used_for_the_: Beddel midabka la iftiimiyay ee loo isticmaalo xarafka hadda, badhamada, iyo calaamadaha muhiimka ah. Ardayda u aragta buluugga inuu aad u qabow yahay ama doonaya midabo diirran oo diiradda leh. High-contrast mode wuxuu ka sarreeyaa tan.
somali.prefer_shorter_or_longer_drill_texts_s: Doorbid qoraallo drill oo gaagaaban ama dhaadheer. "Gaaban" wuxuu caawiyaa ardayda leh dhibaato diiradeed ama daal; "Dheer" waa ardayda dhisaya adkaysi. Haddii drill-ku uusan lahayn sample ku habboon doorbidka, wuxuu ku noqonayaa mid kasta.
somali.a_soft_pulsing_dot_on_the_drill_screen: Dhibic jilicsan oo garaacaysa shaashadda drill-ka waxay muujisaa laxan degan. CIQAAB ma jirto haddii aad gaabiso — tani waa tixraac, ma aha wakhti kama dambays ah. Waxay caawisaa qorsheynta dhaqdhaqaaqa. Waa la damiyay caadi ahaan.
somali.this_is_your_space_why_are_you_practic: Kanu waa boostaada. Maxaad u tababaranaysaa? Waa maxay bartilmaameedkaaga maanta? Wuu ka duwan yahay yoolka IEP ee takhaatiirta.
somali.why_i_m_practicing_shown_on_menu: Sababta aan u tababaranayo (waxaa lagu muujiyaa menu-ga)
somali.e_g_typing_feels_hard_now_but_i_m_goin: tusaale, "Qoristu hadda way adag tahay, laakiin waxaan awoodi doonaa inaan qoro sheekooyinkayga." · "Waxaan rabaa inaan email u diro ayeeyaday hooyaday la'aanteed." · "Qoris degdeg ah = wakhti yar oo shaqo guri ah."
somali.today_s_goal_resets_tomorrow: Yoolka maanta (berri wuu dib u bilaabmayaa)
somali.today_s_goal_is_yours_not_counted_agai: Yoolka maanta waa kaaga — laguuma tirinayo haddii aad seegto. Wuxuu si toos ah dib u bilaabmayaa berri.
somali.set_an_iep_style_goal_here_it_shows_up: Halkan dhig yool nooca IEP ah. Wuxuu ka muuqdaa shaashadda drill-ka wuxuuna horay u buuxiyaa warbixinta horumarka. Waxaa loo baahan yahay kaliya haddii aad samaynayso qoraallo horumar rasmi ah.
somali.use_initials_or_a_pseudonym_alloflow_i: Isticmaal xarfaha hore ama magac been ah — AlloFlow waxaa loo naqshadeeyay inuu ku sii ahaado FERPA-badbaado.
somali.e_g_prefers_home_row_with_large_key_ke: tusaale, Wuxuu doorbidaa home-row oo leh kiiboodh furayaal waaweyn; yaree khaladaadka ka hor inta aanad kordhin xawaaraha.
somali.save_the_accommodations_iep_goal_audio: Kaydi accommodations + yoolka IEP + theme-ka codka JSON, ama ka soo raro profile qalab kale. MA koobiyeeyo taariikhda session-ka — taasi waxay u sii jirtaa arday kasta.
somali.full_backup_includes_sessions_personal: Backup buuxa wuxuu ka koobanyahay session-yada, diiwaanka ugu fiican, xirfadda, khariidadda khaladaadka, iyo labada library — diiwaanka ardayga oo dhan. Isticmaal tan ka hor inta aanad tirtirin xogta browser-ka ama beddelin qalabka.
somali.your_personal_growth_path_no_peer_comp: Jidkaaga koritaanka gaarka ah. Isbarbardhig asxaab ma jiro — kani waa adiga kaliya, wakhti ka dib.
somali.affects_trend_report_csv_skill_tree_st: Waxay saameysaa isbeddelka, warbixinta, CSV. Geedka xirfaddu wuxuu ahaanayaa wakhti kasta.
somali.add_or_edit_a_note_saves_on_blur_or_ct: Ku dar ama wax ka beddel qoraal. Wuxuu kaydiyaa markaad ka baxdo ama Ctrl+Enter.
somali.green_improvement_red_regression_gray_: Δ cagaar = horumar · casaan = dib u dhac · cawl = xukun lama adeegsan (muddo, tirada accommodations).
somali.practice_calendar_last_30_days: Kalandarka tababarka · 30-kii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay
somali.top_error_keys_by_drill_all_time: Furayaasha khaladka ugu badan drill kasta · wakhti kasta
somali.different_drills_surface_different_wea: Drill-yo kala duwan waxay soo bandhigaan daciifnimo kala duwan. Isticmaal tan si aad u doorato drill-yo bartilmaameedsanaya furayaal dhibaato gaar ah.
somali.these_celebrate_trying_accommodations_: Kuwani waxay u dabaaldegayaan isku daygaaga accommodations — ma aha qarintooda. Isticmaalka waxa ku caawiya waa xoog, ma aha daciifnimo.
somali.average_wpm_with_each_accommodation_on: Celceliska WPM iyadoo accommodation kasta uu shidan yahay vs damsan. Isku darka noocyada drill-ka oo dhan — isku darka drill-ku wuu wareerin karaa, sidaas darteed isticmaal kala qaybinta drill kasta ee warbixinta hoose go'aannada muhiimka ah.
somali.tap_the_report_to_select_all_or_use_th: Tabo warbixinta si aad u doorato dhammaan, ama isticmaal badhamada hoose.
somali.copy_a_2_4_sentence_plain_language_sum: Koobiyee kooban 2-4 jumladood oo luqad fudud ah oo email waalid ah
somali.complete_your_first_drill_to_see_your_: Dhammee drill-kaaga koowaad si aad halkan uga aragto aasaaskaaga, isbeddelka, iyo warbixinta IEP.
somali.no_sessions_match_the_current_filter: 🔎 Session u dhigma filter-ka hadda ma jiro.
somali.move_between_drill_cards_and_nav_butto: U dhaqaaq inta u dhexeysa kaararka drill iyo badhamada wareegga
somali.activate_the_focused_drill_card: Shid kaarka drill ee la diiradsaday
somali.repeat_your_last_drill_fast_jump: Ku celi drill-kaagii ugu dambeeyay (bood degdeg ah)
somali.abandon_drill_progress_won_t_save: Ka tag drill-ka (horumarka lama kaydin doono)
somali.activate_focused_button_context_depend: Shid badhanka la diiradsaday (wuxuu ku xiran yahay xaaladda)
somali.everything_in_typing_practice_can_be_r: Wax kasta oo ku jira Tababarka Qorista waxaa lagu gaari karaa kiiboodhka — sidaas ayaa loo naqshadeeyay dadka isticmaala screen-reader iyo accommodations qorsheynta dhaqdhaqaaqa.
somali.accommodation_toggles_on_the_drill_int: Beddelayaasha accommodations ee shaashadda hordhaca drill-ka gabi ahaanba waxaa lagu gaari karaa kiiboodhka iyadoo la adeegsanayo Tab — mouse looma baahna qayb kasta oo qalabkan ah.
somali.optional_game_mode_words_rise_from_the: Nooca ciyaarta ee ikhtiyaariga ah. Erayadu waxay ka kacaan hoosta; qor erayga sare si aad u tirtirto. Haddii tuulmadu ay gaadho saqafka ciyaartu way dhammaanaysaa. Leaderboard ma jiro, dembi streak ma jiro — waa diiwaanka ugu fiican oo kaliya.
somali.each_theme_has_a_mascot_who_shows_up_i: Theme kastaa wuxuu leeyahay mascot ka muuqda garoonka ciyaarta, menu-ga, iyo shaashadda koobanka. Waxay ka falceliyaan waxa aad samaynayso — combo, khatar, weerar, hurdo, guul, guuldarro.
somali.choose_an_attack_word_to_send_to_the_b: Dooro eray weerar ah oo aad u dirto bot-ka
somali.attack_ready_pick_a_word_to_send: ⚡ WEERARKU DIYAAR — dooro eray aad dirto
somali.tap_a_card_or_press_1_2_3_to_send_pres: Tabo kaar AMA tabo 1 / 2 / 3 si aad u dirto. Tabo Esc si aad uga booddo oo aadan dirin. Tuulmadaadu waa barafowday inta aad dooranayso.
somali.paused_both_stacks_frozen_press_resume: ⏸ Waa la joojiyay — labada tuulmo way barafowdeen. Tabo Sii wad ama Esc si aad u sii wadato.
somali.build_foundation_slow_accurate_beats_f: Dhis aasaas. Gaabis + sax wuxuu ka adkaadaa degdeg + dayac.
somali.steady_progression_maintain_accuracy_f: Horumar degan. Ilaali heerka hoose ee saxnaanta.
somali.speed_accuracy_in_productive_band_sust: Xawaare + saxnaan oo ku jira baanka waxsoosaarka. Tababar joogto ah.
somali.high_wpm_achieved_diminishing_returns_: WPM sare waa la gaadhay. Faa'iidada way ka yaraanaysaa xawaaraha.
somali.speed_exceeded_accuracy_budget_backtra: Xawaaruhu wuxuu dhaafay miisaaniyadda saxnaanta. Dib ugu noqo bartilmaameed gaabis ah.
somali.five_sliders_tune_your_practice_target: Shan slider ayaa hagaajinaya bartilmaameedka tababarkaaga. Widget-ku wuxuu aaggaaga u kala saaraa mid ka mid ah 5 xaaladood oo kala duwan wuxuuna sawiraa Pareto frontier-ka WPM-saxnaanta. Dhibco laguma siinayo hagaajintaada — baadhitaanku wuxuu ku jiraa helitaanka meelo tababar oo joogto ah.
somali.pareto_curve_best_accuracy_achievable_: Pareto curve = saxnaanta ugu fiican ee la gaari karo WPM kasta. Kor = ma dhici karo; hoos = meel koritaan ah ayaa jirta.
somali.hypothesis_free_text_what_is_your_sust: Mala-awaal (qoraal xor ah): Waa maxay bartilmaameedkaaga joogtada ah? Sidee heerka hoose ee saxnaantu u beddelaa WPM-ga waxtarka leh?
somali.set_wpm_80_accuracy_98_realistic_compa: Dhig WPM=80, saxnaan=98. Ma dhici kartaa? Isbarbardhig calaamadda aaggaaga.
somali.drop_accuracy_floor_to_80_does_effecti: Hoos u dhig heerka hoose ee saxnaanta ilaa 80%. Ma kordhaa WPM-ga waxtarka leh?
somali.pros_sustain_95_at_70_wpm_investigate_: Xirfadlayaashu waxay ilaaliyaan 95%+ 70+ WPM. Baadh waddooyinka tababarka ee halkaas gaadhsiiya.
somali.a_slower_target_with_high_accuracy_may: Bartilmaameed gaabis ah oo leh saxnaan sare wuxuu soo saari karaa qoraal badan session kasta. Tijaabi.
somali.i_understand_the_tradeoff_explain_in_o: Waan fahmay is-dhaafsiga — ku sharax erayadaada
somali.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_wpm_a: Ku sharax erayadaada: sidee WPM, saxnaanta, iyo xoogga dhaqdhaqaaqu isugu dhexgalaan? Maxay Pareto frontier-ku u taagan tahay tababarka qorista?
somali.design_note_discrete_5_zone_marker_par: Qoraalka naqshadda: calaamad 5 aag oo kala duwan; Pareto curve wuxuu muujiyaa booska is-dhaafsiga; bartilmaameed "sax ah" ma jiro — si ula kac ah.
